name: Rommel's Ac\Rommel Electric\Rommel Harley - Davidson
message: Rommel's Ace is part of Rommel Holdings, Inc., a mid-sized holding company located in Fruitland, MD. Rommel Holdings has owned andoperated a variety of businesses dating back to the 1950's.We are going to upload about 2 GB of corporate data. This is not much but there is so much personal information of almost every employee including terminated ones. Passport numbers, addresses, personal emails, SSNs, medical records and is on. You will also find a lot of accounting and projects files of Rommel Electric and Rommel Harley - Davidson companies.
